note: 2026-06-03 [coupling-budget recalibration]: 115 -> 460 (x4). Same rationale as the cross-package coupling budgets: distinct runtime symbols imported FROM a leaf package (graph-model tops this metric) is a weak coupling signal once the package is already a widely-used domain leaf. Adding one more pure domain helper (e.g. agentBaseName) to graph-model's fan-in is not meaningful complexity growth. Headroom, not a tight bound; ratchet down over time.
